name: wpvdb-smart-search
description: Adds a public Smart Search page and REST endpoint for wpvdb dense, sparse, and hybrid search.
author: Automattic, Ramon Corrales

scripts.i18n: bun run pot && for po in languages/wpvdb-smart-search-*.po; do [ -e "$po" ] || continue; msgmerge --update --backup=none "$po" languages/wpvdb-smart-search.pot; perl -0pi -e 's/POT-Creation-Date: [^\\]*\\n/POT-Creation-Date: \\n/g' "$po"; msgfmt --check "$po" -o "${po%.po}.mo"; done
scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:css && bun run lint:php
scripts.fix: bun run fix:js && bun run fix:css && bun run fix:php
scripts.release: bun run build && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release && rsync -r . ./release/wpvdb-smart-search --exclude-from=.distignore && cd release && zip -r wpvdb-smart-search.zip wpvdb-smart-search >/dev/null && echo 'wrote release/wpvdb-smart-search.zip'
